content.content:
<gap:target id="breadcrumbs-component-block">
      .breadcrumbs {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-2);
        min-width: 0;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-item {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        min-width: 0;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-link,
      .breadcrumbs-current {
        min-width: 0;
        max-width: 100%;
        overflow: hidden;
        text-overflow: ellipsis;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-link {
        color: var(--neutral-700);
        font-weight: 500;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-link:hover {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        text-decoration: underline;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-current {
        color: var(--neutral-900);
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-separator {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        color: var(--neutral-400);
        flex: 0 0 auto;
      }

      .breadcrumbs-item[aria-current="page"] .breadcrumbs-current {
        color: var(--color-primary);
      }

      @media (max-width: 576px) {
        .breadcrumbs {
          flex-wrap: nowrap;
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        .breadcrumbs-item:first-child .breadcrumbs-link,
        .breadcrumbs-item:first-child .breadcrumbs-current {
          max-width: 8rem;
        }

        .breadcrumbs-item:not(:first-child):not(:last-child) .breadcrumbs-link,
        .breadcrumbs-item:not(:first-child):not(:last-child) .breadcrumbs-current {
          max-width: 6rem;
        }

        .breadcrumbs-item:last-child .breadcrumbs-link,
        .breadcrumbs-item:last-child .breadcrumbs-current {
          max-width: 10rem;
        }
      }
    </gap:target>
